# installed separately via: make setup && make setup-gameworld && make setup-axiom

# To reproduce the exact environment:
#   python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate
#   pip install -r requirements-lock.txt
#   pip install -e vendor/gameworld && pip install -e vendor/axiom && pip install -e .

# For the normal (latest-compatible) setup, just use: make setup
